Info.title: Information
Info.subtitle1: Discover our cuisine designed with seasonal and local products.
Info.subtitle2: Our menu is designed to be convivial, gourmet and gastronomic.
Info.hours_value:
Open from Tuesday to Saturday
12:00 PM to 1:30 PM / 7:30 PM to 9:30 PM
closed Wednesday lunch.

Story.title: Our Story
Story.p1: Located in the historic heart of Bordeaux, facing the Grosse Cloche and a stone's throw from Place Fernand Lafargue,
Story.p2: « Les Négociants » is the realization of the dream of two restaurant enthusiasts, Florian and Julien.
Story.p3: Our establishment stands out for its concept combining tasting, sophistication and conviviality, offering a tasty and gourmet culinary experience.
Story.p4: At « Les Négociants », we make it a point of honor to work with fresh and seasonal products, carefully selected to guarantee exceptional quality in every dish. Our bistronomic cuisine will delight the most demanding palates while respecting the authenticity and richness of the ingredients.
Story.p5: Our wine list, meticulously elaborated with 250 references, reflects our love for wine and our desire to make you discover wine treasures. Each bottle has been chosen to enhance your meal and offer you a perfect match.
Story.p6: Join us at Les Négociants and let yourself be seduced by our universe.

MenuCarte.title: A LA CARTE MENU
MenuCarte.subtitle: ( Served only in the EVENING from Tuesday to Saturday )
MenuCarte.description: With our chef Antoine and his assistant Louis, we offer you a bistronomic cuisine with fresh and seasonal products. Enjoy French cuisine and our chef's passion, driven by the pleasure of playing with textures and product variations.

MenuWeek.title: OUR WEEKLY MENU
MenuWeek.subtitle: ( LUNCH only from Tuesday to Saturday )

Gallery.title: A FEW PLATES FROM OUR MENU
Gallery.privatization_info: Our lounge in total immersion in the wine cellar can be privatized for any type of event: up to 20 people for a privatization
Gallery.terrace_info: Our terrace, shaded or sunny, the choice is yours!

FindUs.title: Find Us
FindUs.description: Find us in the heart of Bordeaux at 3 rue de Guienne, near Place Fernand Lafargue and admire the Grosse Cloche from " LES NÉGOCIANTS "

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.description: Do you have any questions, suggestions or comments? We would love to hear from you! Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
